name: Checkerboard Cake
recipeIngredient: 3 Unsweetened chocolate squares or the melted choc.
1/2 cup Almonds, blanched, then browned and coarsely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine hot water, sugar, and chocolate in a double boiler. Heat until the chocolate melts. Stir to blend.
2. Soften gelatin in cold water and add it to the chocolate mixture. Stir and cook until smooth and thick (about 5 minutes).
3. Add the chocolate mixture to the egg yolks. Mix well. Let cool for 5 minutes.
4. Add vanilla, then fold in the stiffly beaten egg whites. Cool completely.
5. Whip the cream and fold in nuts. Add this to the chocolate mixture.
6. Grease an angel (tube) cake pan. Break the cake into small pieces that are about the size of eggs.
7. Put a layer of cake pieces into the pan and pour some of the chocolate mixture over it, allowing it to run through. Repeat until all the cake and sauce are used.
8. Cover and let set in the refrigerator for about 8 hours before serving.
9. To serve, ice with whipped cream or Cool Whip after turning out on a serving plate. Decorate with browned almonds.
10. The cake can be iced several hours before serving and should be served very cold.
